title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: A YouTube video demonstrates building an event management system with role-based access control, permissions, and workflow automations using Softr's AI Co-Builder. The creator compares Softr against competing no-code platforms like Lovable and Replit, highlighting cost efficiency and the ability to generate functional apps without iterative re-prompting.
